spdx:CERN Open Hardware Licence Version 2 - Permissive
Create a text file (typically named LICENSE or LICENSE.txt) in the root of your
source code and copy the text of the license into the file.
A permissive license for hardware designs, with conditions only requiring
preservation of notices. Contributors provide an express grant of patent rights.
